lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਇਓ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਲੇਖੁ ਮਥਾਮਾ ॥੪॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak tis bheo paraapat jaa kai lekh mathaamaa |4|11|
lines.english: Says Nanak, he alone receives it, upon whose forehead such destiny is inscribed. ||4||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਇਹੈ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਓ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat ihai beechaario sarab sukhaa har naamaa |
lines.english: Searching and searching, I have come to this realization: all peace and bliss are in the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਕਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: anadin raam ke gun kaheeai |
lines.english: Night and day, utter the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਸਰਬ ਸੂਖ ਸਿਧਿ ਮਨ ਬਾਂਛਤ ਫਲ ਲਹੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagal padaarath sarab sookh sidh man baanchhat fal laheeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall obtain all wealth, all pleasures and successes, and the fruits of your mind's desires. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਸਿਮਰਹ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu sant praan sukhadaate simarah prabh abinaasee |
lines.english: Come, O Saints, let us meditate in remembrance on God; He is the Eternal, Imperishable Giver of Peace and Praanaa, the Breath of Life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਤ ਸੁਨਤ ਸੁਨਾਵਤ ਸਰਧਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀ ਵਡਭਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavat sunat sunaavat saradhaa har ras pee vaddabhaage |
lines.english: The very fortunate ones drink in the Sublime Essence of the Lord, singing, reciting and listening to the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥਹ ਨਾਥੁ ਦੀਨ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਘਟ ਵਾਸੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anaathah naath deen dukh bhanjan poor rahio ghatt vaasee |1|
lines.english: Master of the masterless, Destroyer of the pains of the meek and the poor; He is All-pervading and permeating, abiding in all hearts. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਤਜਿ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਤੂਟੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh jhootth taj nindaa har simaran bandhan tootte |
lines.english: So abandon your sexual desire, greed, falsehood and slander; meditating in remembrance on the Lord, you shall be released from bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਮਿਟੇ ਸਭਿ ਤਨ ਤੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਲਿਵ ਜਾਗੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kal kales mitte sabh tan te raam naam liv jaage |2|
lines.english: All their sufferings and struggles are wiped away from their bodies; they remain lovingly awake and aware in the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਅਹੰ ਅੰਧ ਮਮਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਛੂਟੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: moh magan ahan andh mamataa gur kirapaa te chhootte |3|
lines.english: The intoxication of loving attachments, egotism and blind possessiveness are eradicated by Guru's Grace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: too samarath paarabraham suaamee kar kirapaa jan teraa |
lines.english: You are All-Powerful, O Supreme Lord God and Master; please be Merciful to Your humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਰਬ ਮਹਿ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨੇਰਾ ॥੪॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: poor rahio sarab meh tthaakur naanak so prabh neraa |4|12|
lines.english: My Lord and Master is All-pervading and prevailing everywhere; O Nanak, God is Near. ||4||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਚਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: balihaaree guradev charan |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Feet of the Divine Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਹਮਾਰੀ ਗਤਿ ਕਰਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai sang paarabraham dhiaaeeai upades hamaaree gat karan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I meditate with Him on the Supreme Lord God; His Teachings have emancipated me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਜਪੈ ਅਵਰਹ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਵੈ ਵਡ ਸਮਰਥ ਤਾਰਨ ਤਰਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aap japai avarah naam japaavai vadd samarath taaran taran |1|
lines.english: He Himself chants, and inspires others to chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord. He is Utterly All-Powerful; He carries us across to the other side. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਰੋਗ ਭੈ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਨਾਸੇ ਜੋ ਆਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤ ਸਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: dookh rog bhai sagal binaase jo aavai har sant saran |
lines.english: All pains, diseases and fears are erased, for one who comes to the Sanctuary of the Lord's Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਾਸਨ ਕੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਮਾਨਤ ਤੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਫੁਨਿ ਗਰਭ ਪਰਨ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har daasan kee aagiaa maanat te naahee fun garabh paran |2|
lines.english: Those who obey the Order of the Lord's slaves, do not enter into the womb of reincarnation ever again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੋ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਉਤਾਰੈ ਸਹਸਾ ਊਣੇ ਕਉ ਸੁਭਰ ਭਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: jaa ko mantru utaarai sahasaa aoone kau subhar bharan |
lines.english: His Mantra drives out cynicism, and totally fills the empty one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਨ ਕੀ ਟਹਲ ਕਮਾਵਤ ਗਾਵਤ ਦੁਖ ਕਾਟੇ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: bhagatan kee ttehal kamaavat gaavat dukh kaatte taa ke janam maran |
lines.english: Whoever works for the Lord's devotees and sings His Praises - his pains of birth and death are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭਇਓ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਬੀਠੁਲਾ ਤਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਜਰ ਜਰਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa kau bheo kripaal beetthulaa tin har har ajar jaran |3|
lines.english: Those unto whom my Beloved becomes Merciful, endure the Unendurable Ecstasy of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸਹਿ ਅਘਾਨੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਨੇ ਮੁਖ ਤੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾਤ ਬਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: har raseh aghaane sehaj samaane mukh te naahee jaat baran |
lines.english: Those who are satisfied by the Sublime Essence of the Lord, merge intuitively into the Lord; no mouth can describe their state.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਇਓ ਰੀ ਮੈ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਮੰਗਲ ਗਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: gaaeo ree mai gun nidh mangal gaaeo |
lines.english: I sing, O I sing the Songs of Joy of my Lord, the Treasure of Virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤੋਖੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਉਧਰਨ ॥੪॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad naanak santokhe naam prabhoo jap jap udharan |4|13|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, O Nanak, they are content; chanting and meditating on God's Name, they are saved. ||4||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲੇ ਸੰਜੋਗ ਭਲੇ ਦਿਨ ਅਉਸਰ ਜਉ ਗੋਪਾਲੁ ਰੀਝਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhale sanjog bhale din aausar jau gopaal reejhaaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Fortunate is the time, fortunate is the day and the moment, when I become pleasing to the Lord of the World. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੇ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਸੰਤ ਧਰੇ ਹਾਥਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hamare masatak sant dhare haathaa |1|
lines.english: The Saints have placed their hands on my forehead. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹ ਚਰਨ ਮੋਰਲੋ ਮਾਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: santah charan moralo maathaa |
lines.english: I touch my forehead to the Feet of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਗਤੁ ਹੋਏ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਨੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa te gat hoe trai guneea |2|
lines.english: and I have risen above the three qualities||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਹ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਮੋਰਲੋ ਮਨੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: saadhah mantru moralo manooaa |
lines.english: My mind is filled with the Mantra of the Holy Saints,

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹ ਤੂਟੇ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: lobh moh tootte bhram sangaa |3|
lines.english: Greed and attachment are gone, along with doubt. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਹ ਦਰਸੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਨੈਨ ਰੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhagatah daras dekh nain rangaa |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision, the Darshan of God's devotees, my eyes are filled with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਅਨੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak sukh sehaj anandaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have found intuitive peace, poise and bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਲੑਿ ਭੀਤਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦਾ ॥੪॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: khola bheet mile paramaanandaa |4|14|
lines.english: Tearing down the wall, I have met the Lord, the Embodiment of Supreme Bliss. ||4||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੈਸੇ ਕਹਉ ਮੋਹਿ ਜੀਅ ਬੇਦਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kaise khau mohi jeea bedanaaee |
lines.english: How can I express the pain of my soul?

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨ ਪਿਆਸ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਮਨੋਹਰ ਮਨੁ ਨ ਰਹੈ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਉਮਕਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: darasan piaas pria preet manohar man na rahai bahu bidh umakaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am so thirsty for the Blessed Vision, the Darshan of my Enticing and Lovely Beloved. My mind cannot survive - it yearns for Him in so many ways. ||1||Pause||
